name: rakshith
description: Problem Statement Many elderly patients and individuals face difficulties in: Managing medical records Booking appointments quickly Getting help during emergencies Keeping family members informed This project solves these issues by providing a connected healthcare ecosystem. 💡 Solution A centralized platform where: Patients can manage their health Doctors can treat patients digitally Hospitals can manage operations Family members can monitor patient health 👥 User Roles & Features 👤 Patient Create and manage account Book, reschedule, or cancel appointments View prescriptions and medical history Add family members Trigger emergency alerts Join video consultations 👨‍👩‍👧 Family Member Access patient data (with permission) View appointments and prescriptions Receive emergency alerts Track medicine reminders 👨‍⚕️ Doctor View and manage appointments Access patient medical history Add prescriptions Conduct video consultations Mark appointments as completed 🏥 Hospital Manage doctors (add/remove/view) Manage appointments (approve/reject/assign/reschedule) Handle emergency alerts Monitor system activity 🔑 Key Features 📅 Appointment Management Book and manage appointments Assign doctors Track appointment status 💊 Prescription System Doctors can create and send prescriptions Patients can view prescription history 🎥 Video Consultation Doctors and patients can connect remotely Enables treatment without visiting the hospital 🚨 Emergency Alert System One-click emergency button Sends alerts to: Family members Hospital Shares patient location for quick response 👨‍👩‍👧 Family Access System Patients can add multiple family members Family members get limited access Helps monitor elderly patients 🔐 Multi-User Login System Role-based login (Patient, Doctor, Hospital, Family) Secure authentication (Email/Password, OTP) Role-based dashboards 🔄 System Flow Patient registers and logs in Patient books an appointment Hospital approves and assigns a doctor Doctor views appointment and consults patient Doctor adds prescription Patient and family can view updates In emergencies, alerts are sent instantly 🔒 Security Features Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) OTP verification Secure authentication Data privacy restrictions 🧠 Tech Stack (Example) Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript / React Backend: Node.js / Django Database: MongoDB / MySQL Authentication: Firebase / JWT Video Call: WebRTC / Zoom API 🚀 Future Enhancements AI-based health recommendations Wearable device integration Live ambulance tracking Multi-language support
